one_line_description: Helpdesk software with multichannel ticketing, live chat, and call center features.
auth_summary: API v3 authenticates via an API key passed in an 'apikey' header; admins create keys (with per-key permissions) under Configuration > System > API. No OAuth2 found.
access_notes: Self-serve free trial signup; admins generate API keys directly from the agent panel. Full interactive API docs are hosted per-account at YOURDOMAIN.ladesk.com/docs/api/v3/.
api_surface_summary: REST API v3 covering tickets, chats, calls, agents, contacts, companies, departments, tags, and filters. Cloud accounts are rate-limited to 180 requests/minute per API key.
agent_notes: Full endpoint reference is only browsable inside a LiveAgent account domain (docs are per-instance), so breadth was assessed from support articles and the Python client repo rather than a public API reference page. No official or community MCP server found in searches.
